finding: TASK-RFT-0036 can make packages/cli/src/commands/evidence/bundle-io.ts bounded with a facade and compact implementation carrier, but the read, write, manifest, auto-evidence, historical-batch, and git-head evidence concerns should still be expanded into semantic modules for maintainability.
